title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 03 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 03/01/2023
Image reference: 2023-01-03_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-03-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have remained stable
No reported sales this week. Tankers : Tanker values have firmed
Suezmax Crescent Moon (150,600 DWT, Oct 2004, Universal) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 33.50 mil, VV Value USD 30.98 mil - DD Passed. Suezmax Kriti Breeze (151,800 DWT, Nov 2003, Hyundai HI) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 30.50 mil, VV Value 27.89 mil - DD Due.
